title: Abracadabra - REKT
relevance_summary: ERC-4626 first depositor exploit followed by flash loan and repeated borrowing/repaying to inflate share price

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls repayForAll() after a flash loan in the same tx
Monitor and block repeated borrowing and repaying to inflate share price

red_flags: flash loan followed by repeated borrowing/repaying
summary: The hack involved exploiting the ERC-4626 first depositor vulnerability, followed by a flash loan and repeated borrowing/repaying to inflate the share price. A guard could have blocked the attack by monitoring and preventing these specific actions.
